FAQ
FAQ

Questions about the partner program

Partners can earn up to Rs 1,00,000 per month depending on the number of successful referrals they convert. There is no cap on earnings — the more construction companies you refer and convert, the more you earn. The commission is paid per successful client, and settlements happen every week so you never have to wait long for your earnings.

No. There is zero investment required to join the SiteFlow channel partner program. You do not need to build any infrastructure, hire a team, or purchase licenses. Your role is simply to connect construction companies with SiteFlow. We handle the demos, onboarding, and support — you earn the commission on every successful conversion.

Anyone with access to construction professionals in India can apply. The best partners are civil engineers, architects, construction consultants, ERP resellers, real estate agents, material suppliers, and industry association members who already have relationships with builders, contractors, or project managers. If your network includes construction decision-makers, you are a fit.

Payments are settled weekly — you do not have to wait for a monthly cycle. Once a referral converts into a paying SiteFlow client, your commission is calculated and added to the next weekly settlement. Payments are made directly to your bank account. The process is straightforward with no hidden deductions or complicated approval chains.

Once you join, you get a dedicated partner manager who assists you with pitching, answering prospect questions, and closing referrals. We provide you with sales collateral, product demos on demand, and any technical support needed during the sales conversation. You focus on making the introduction — we close and onboard the client.

Every partner gets access to a partner dashboard where you can track the status of each referral — from introduction to demo scheduled, to converted. Commission statements are shared with each weekly settlement so you always know exactly what you have earned and from which referral. Full transparency with no ambiguity.

No limit. You can refer as many construction companies as you want. There is no cap on the number of referrals, no cap on conversions, and no cap on your earnings. The program is designed to scale with you — the more connections you bring in, the more you earn, with no ceiling on monthly income.

Our partnerships team reviews your application and contacts you within one business day. We schedule a short onboarding call to understand your network and walk you through the referral process, commission structure, and partner portal. Most partners are ready to start referring within 24 to 48 hours of applying.
